sizing_rule.note: Risk 3.5% of account equity per trade using formula: position_size = (account_equity × 0.035) / (entry_price - stop_loss_price). Maximum 8 concurrent positions. Core principle: position sizing is primary driver of system performance, not entry/exit signals.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is the primary driver of trading system performance; identical entry/exit signals produce vastly different returns when position sizing varies, making it the critical fourth dimension of system design.
